title: Your request to subscribe to MedEffect e-Notice has been submitted. - Canada.ca
content:
## Your request to subscribe to MedEffect e-Notice has been submitted.
A subscription e-mail confirmation has been sent to the e-mail account that you provided. If you do not receive this e-mail within 24 hours, there may be a problem with the e-mail address that you provided (e.g. a spelling mistake, etc.). You may resubmit your e-mail on the Subscription Form or contact the Health Product InfoWatch Team .
